The '''Dousc system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Kesh sector/Legends|Kesh sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] that contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ebra]].
